papers.title_en: Novel Quantification of Non-convex Grain Morphology in Printed Ti–6Al–4V
papers.authors: Ioannis Dalezios, Gregory D. Wong, Tuan Nguyen-Minh, Leo A. I. Kestens, Anthony D. Rollett
papers.tldr: 本研究针对增材制造Ti-6Al-4V合金中复杂的非凸晶粒形貌，提出了一种基于凸包拟合和实心度（solidity）的新型量化评估方法。通过重建原始β晶粒并对比合成微观结构，研究证明了该方法在捕捉AM组织形貌复杂性方面优于传统长宽比指标。研究还发现，在选定的工艺窗口内，尽管晶粒尺寸略有变化，但晶粒形状对激光功率和扫描速度的变化并不敏感。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Complete and accurate quantification of additively manufactured microstructures, along with all their relevant features, is essential for reliable model development, calibration and qualification. This study analyzed trends in grain size and shape in a set of orientation maps acquired from samples of LPBF Ti–6Al–4V printed with varying power and scan speed, all within the process window. The EBSD maps of the $$\alpha $$ α phase were used to reconstruct the parent $$\beta $$ β grain structure. Fitting a convex hull around each $$\beta $$ β grain and computing solidity was found to be effective in capturing the non-traditional morphology of the AM microstructures and their asymmetry with respect to the build direction. An equivalent synthetically generated microstructure with similar grain size and aspect ratio was used for comparison of the developed metrics between it and the AM-fabricated samples. The comparison shows that the aspect ratio fails to capture the morphological complexity of AM microstructures, whereas the new metrics effectively differentiate the two types of microstructures. Other than a slight variation in grain size, the grain shape exhibits negligible variation across the range of processing conditions explored.

papers.title_en: Influence of Ti and Ta on Deformation, Segregation, and Ordering Kinetics in Polycrystalline CoNi-Based Superalloys
papers.authors: A. Bezold, N. Karpstein, A. J. Egan, E. Spiecker, M. Göken, M. J. Mills, S. Neumeier
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了Ti和Ta对多晶CoNi基高温合金变形、偏析及有序化动力学的影响。通过对比不同Ti/Ta含量的合金与Udimet720Li，发现Ti和Ta能显著提高γ'相的反相畴界（APB）能，使变形机制从APB剪切转向抗蠕变性更强的堆垛层错模式。Ta因其较高的扩散速率，能促进层错处有序相的快速形成，有效抑制微孪晶增厚，为设计下一代高抗蠕变高温合金提供了重要指导。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Polycrystalline CoNi-based superalloys exhibit an attractive property profile for intermediate-temperature applications, with Ti- and Ta-rich variants showing exceptional creep resistance compared to cast & wrought Ni-based superalloys. However, the mechanisms underlying this improvement remain insufficiently understood. In this study, the deformation and segregation behavior of three CoNi-based alloys with varying Ti and Ta contents were systematically examined and benchmarked against Udimet720Li. Interrupted compression creep tests at 750 °C were combined with advanced scanning transmission electron microscopy and atomic-scale energy dispersive spectroscopy to reveal the controlling mechanisms. Our results demonstrate that Ti and Ta additions increase the anti-phase boundary energy (APB) of the γ ′ phase, facilitating a beneficial transition from APB-based shearing to a more creep-resistant, stacking fault-dominated deformation regime. A quantitative correlation between APB energy and the diffusional length of γ -forming elements was established to rationalize this transition. Strengthening through localized phase transformations along planar faults is effective but kinetically limited by solute diffusion, particularly of W. Ta proves uniquely beneficial, as its higher diffusivity enables rapid formation of ordered phases along stacking faults and microtwin boundaries, thereby suppressing microtwin thickening. By contrast, Ta-free alloys exhibit delayed transformation and an initial softening. These insights provide guidelines for the design of next-generation creep-resistant superalloys.

papers.title_en: Sample-efficient active learning for materials informatics using integrated posterior variance
papers.authors: Ramsey Issa, Said Hamad, Ricardo Grau-Crespo, Emad Awad, Taylor D. Sparks
papers.evidence: 用于材料信息学和性质预测的主动学习
papers.tldr: 本研究针对材料信息学中实验和计算成本高昂的挑战，提出了一种基于集成后验方差（IPV）的高效主动学习框架。该方法通过在候选空间内最小化模型的全局预测不确定性，实现了极高的样本利用效率，能够以更少的实验数据显著提升材料性能预测的准确性，为加速新材料发现提供了高效的计算方案。
papers.abstract_en: Computational Materials Science did not provide an abstract for this paper.

papers.title_en: Achieving exceptional strength-ductility synergy in transition metal high-entropy alloys via machine learning-assisted multi-objective optimization
papers.authors: Rongxin Liao, Yang Li, Zhongfei Ye, Xu Wang, Xia Li, Jiahao Qian, Xinghao Wei, Yun Zou
papers.evidence: 机器学习辅助的合金性质多目标优化
papers.tldr: 本研究针对过渡金属高熵合金中强度与塑性难以兼得的权衡难题，利用机器学习辅助的多目标优化方法，成功设计出具有卓越强塑性协同效应的新型合金。通过整合实验数据与先进算法，研究提出了一种高效的成分筛选策略，显著提升了合金的综合力学性能，为高性能结构材料的快速开发提供了新途径。
papers.abstract_en: Journal of Alloys and Compounds did not provide an abstract for this paper.

papers.title_en: Structural insights and predictive screening of ion transport in Li-rich alloys via neuroevolution potentials
papers.authors: Di Jin, Shicong Ding, Hailong Qiu, Yang Li, Xinyang Li, Guochun Yang
papers.evidence: 通过神经进化势进行预测性筛选
papers.tldr: 本研究利用神经进化势（NEP）机器学习力场，深入探讨了富锂合金的微观结构与离子传输特性。通过高精度的分子动力学模拟，揭示了合金组分对锂离子扩散效率的影响机制，并实现了对高性能离子传输材料的快速预测性筛选。该方法克服了传统第一性原理计算的效率瓶颈，为优化锂电池负极材料提供了关键的结构见解和高效的计算框架。
papers.abstract_en: npj Computational Materials did not provide an abstract for this paper.

papers.title_en: Accurate screening of functional materials with machine-learning potential and transfer-learned regressions: Heusler alloy benchmark
papers.evidence: 合金的机器学习势函数与性质预测
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了一种机器学习加速的高通量筛选工作流，用于发现具有高磁晶各向异性（E_aniso）的 Heusler 合金。通过结合通用机器学习原子间势进行结构优化，并利用迁移学习回归模型预测磁性及稳定性，该方法在 DxMag 数据库上表现优异。经 DFT 验证，该工作流能高效准确地识别候选功能材料，并展示了在未知元素上的泛化能力。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract We present a machine learning-accelerated high-throughput (HTP) workflow for the discovery of functional materials. As a test case, quaternary and all- d Heusler compounds were screened for stable compounds with large magnetocrystalline anisotropy energy ( E aniso ). Structure optimization and evaluation of formation energy and energy above the convex hull were performed using the eSEN-30M-OAM interatomic potential, while local magnetic moments, phonon stability, magnetic stability, and E aniso were predicted by eSEN models trained on our DxMag Heusler database. A frozen transfer learning strategy was employed to improve accuracy. Candidate compounds identified by the ML-HTP workflow were validated with density functional theory, confirming high predictive precision. We also benchmark the performance of different uMLIPs, discuss the fidelity of local magnetic moment prediction, and demonstrate generalization to unseen elements via transfer learning from a universal interatomic potential.

papers.title_en: Quantum-annealed machine learning discovers ductile, high strength and corrosion-resistant high-entropy alloy
papers.authors: Diego Ibarra-Hoyos, Peter F. Connors, Ho Jang, Nathan Grain, Israel Klich, Gia-Wei Chern, Peter K. Liaw, John R. Scully, Joseph Poon
papers.evidence: 机器学习预测合金的机械与腐蚀性能
papers.tldr: 本研究利用量子退火机器学习技术，在广阔的高熵合金成分空间中进行高效搜索，成功发现了一种兼具高延展性、高强度和优异耐腐蚀性能的新型高熵合金。该方法克服了传统实验试错法的低效性，证明了量子计算辅助的机器学习在复杂多目标材料设计中的巨大潜力，为开发下一代高性能结构材料提供了新途径。
papers.abstract_en: npj Computational Materials did not provide an abstract for this paper.

                    titanium analogy
papers.authors: J.P. Magnussen, Í. Carneiro, K. Ma, C. Coleman, A. Wisbey, H. Swan, A.J. Knowles
papers.evidence: 通过钛类比设计的锆合金
papers.tldr: 本研究借鉴近α型钛合金的设计理念，开发了新型高温锆合金 Zr-Al-Sn-(Si,Cr,V)。通过引入铝、锡等固溶强化元素以及硅、铬、钒等微量元素，模拟钛合金的组织特征，旨在提升锆合金在高温环境下的力学性能和抗蠕变能力，为核能及航空航天领域的高温结构材料提供了新的设计思路。
papers.abstract_en: Acta Materialia did not provide an abstract for this paper.

papers.title_en: Searching for new multi-component alloys with desirable stacking fault energies: The compositional dependency of binary interaction terms
papers.authors: Chunguang Tang, Muhammad A. Ghouri, Jiaojiao Yi, Matthew R. Barnett
papers.evidence: 多组元合金的性质预测
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多组元合金中堆垛层错能（SFE）预测的复杂性，提出了一种考虑二元相互作用项成分依赖性的改进模型。SFE是决定合金塑性变形机制（如孪晶或相变诱导塑性）的关键物理量。通过精确捕捉二元项随成分变化的规律，该方法显著提升了在广阔成分空间内预测SFE的准确性。这一进展为高通量筛选具有特定力学性能的新型多组元合金提供了强有力的计算支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Scripta Materialia did not provide an abstract for this paper.

papers.title_en: Data-driven insights into composition-property relationships in FCC high entropy alloys
papers.authors: Nicolás Flores, Daniel Salas Mula, Wenle Xu, Bibhu Sahu, Daniel Lewis, Alexandra Eve Salinas, Samantha Mitra, Raj Mahat, Surya R. Kalidindi, Justin Wilkerson, James Paramore, Ankit Srivastiva, George Pharr, Douglas Allaire, Ibrahim Karaman, Brady Butler, Vahid Attari, Raymundo Arróyave
papers.evidence: 成分-性质关系的数据驱动见解
papers.tldr: 本研究利用数据驱动方法深入探讨了面心立方（FCC）高熵合金的成分与性能之间的复杂关系。通过整合实验数据并应用机器学习技术，研究旨在揭示影响合金力学性能的关键成分因素，并建立可靠的预测模型，从而为高性能合金的快速设计和优化提供科学依据与技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Scripta Materialia did not provide an abstract for this paper.

papers.title_en: Domain features-informed two-step machine learning: accelerating the search for superlubric heterostructures
papers.authors: Lu Chen, Yunjia Huang, Hanyue Zhang, Ruoyu Li, Hui Mei, Junqin Shi, Zhe Liu, Feng Zhou, Weimin Liu, Xiaoli Fan
papers.evidence: 机器学习用于异质结构性质预测
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了一种结合领域特征的两步机器学习框架，旨在加速超润滑异质结的搜索过程。通过整合物理领域知识，该方法克服了传统计算模拟的高成本限制，实现了对具有超低摩擦特性材料的高效筛选，为新型固体润滑材料的设计提供了强有力的计算支撑。
papers.abstract_en: npj Computational Materials did not provide an abstract for this paper.

papers.title_en: Determining the grain orientations of battery materials from electron diffraction patterns using convolutional neural networks
papers.authors: Jonas Scheunert, Shamail Ahmed, Thomas Demuth, Andreas Beyer, Sebastian Wissel, Bai-Xiang Xu, Kerstin Volz
papers.evidence: 通过晶粒取向研究结构性质关系
papers.tldr: 本研究针对锂离子电池正极材料LiNiO2，提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的晶粒取向分析方法。通过在动态模拟的电子衍射图谱上训练模型，CNN能够高效预测三个欧拉角，从而确定晶粒取向。相比传统模板匹配法，该方法在准确性和效率上均有显著提升，为透射电子显微镜（TEM）数据的高通量表征提供了新途径。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Polycrystalline materials have numerous applications due to their unique properties, which are often determined by the grain orientation relationships. Hence, quantitative characterization of grain as well as interface orientation is essential to optimize these materials, particularly energy materials. Using scanning transmission electron microscopy (TEM), materials can be analysed in an extremely fine grid of scan points via electron diffraction patterns at each scan point. By matching the diffraction patterns to a simulated database, the crystal orientation of a grain at each scan point can be determined. In this work, we train convolutional neural networks on dynamically simulated diffraction patterns of LiNiO 2 , an important cathode-active material for lithium-ion batteries, to predict the orientation of grains in terms of three Euler angles for the complete fundamental orientation region. Results demonstrate that these networks outperform the conventional pattern-matching algorithm with increased accuracy and efficiency. The former can be attributed to the fact that these models are trained by data incorporating dynamical effects. This work is an attempt to apply deep learning for the analysis of TEM data to determine the grain orientation and enlighten the great potential of machine learning to accelerate the analysis of electron microscopy data, toward a high-throughput characterization technique.
